query:
SELECT
            users.id AS user_id,
            email_configs.id AS email_config_id,
            email_configs.email_address AS email_address,
            users.username,
            users.display_name,
            users.week_start_day
        FROM email_configs
            JOIN users ON email_configs.user_id = users.id
                AND email_configs.active = true
        WHERE user_id = $1
        LIMIT 1
